title: Soul Of Varisu - Varisu
stanzas:
aaraariraaro ketkuthamma
nerinil vanthathu en nijama
naan konda kaayangal poguthama
naadiyum mellisai aaguthamma

pillai vaasathil aasaigal
thoranam sooduthamma
nenjam aanandha megathil
oonjalim aaduthamma

en uryil irundhu
pirindha paguthi ingae
naan izhantha sirippum
indhaya thudippim inage
meendum ingae

indha nodi neram
ennuyiril eeram
kannedhiril kaalam, nindruvidumaa
en idhazhin oram
punnagaiyin kolam
indha varam yaavum, thangividuma

paal mugam kaanave
naan thaviththen
indru nee vara ketkudhe aaroo
kaal thadam veezhave
naan thiduthen
unnai thaai madi yendhuthae thaalo
tamilStanzas:
ஆராரிராரோ கேட்குதம்மா
நேரினில் வந்தது என் நிஜமா
நான் கொண்ட காயங்கள் போகுதம்மா
நாடியும் மெல்லிசை ஆகுதம்மா
பிள்ளை வாசத்தில் ஆசைகள்
தோரணம் சூடுதம்மா
நெஞ்சம் ஆனந்த மேகத்தில்
ஊஞ்சலில் ஆடுதம்மா

என் உயிரில் இருந்து
பிரிந்த பகுதி இங்கே
நான் இழந்த சிரிப்பும்
இதய துடிப்பும் இங்கே
மீண்டும் இங்கே

இந்த நொடி நேரம்
என்னுயிரில் ஈரம்
கண்ணெதிரில் காலம், நின்றுவிடுமா
என் இதழின் ஓரம்
புன்னகையின் கோலம்
இந்த வரம் யாவும், தங்கிவிடுமா

பால் முகம் காணவே
நான் தவித்தேன்
இன்று நீ வர கேட்குதே ஆரோ
கால் தடம் விழவே
நான் துடித்தேன்
உன்னை தாய் மாடி ஏந்துதே தாலோ

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Soul Of Varisu'?

The song conveys themes of spirituality and emotional connection, reflecting on life's journey and experiences.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

While the movie Varisu is not fully detailed, the song likely plays a significant role in expressing the protagonist's inner thoughts and feelings.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by K.S.Chitra and composed by Thaman S, known for their exceptional contributions to Tamil music.

When was 'Soul Of Varisu' released?

The song was published on March 23, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Soul Of Varisu' beautifully encapsulates the essence of nostalgia and spirituality, inviting listeners to reflect on their life's journey. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Vivek, it evokes a sense of calm and introspection. K.S.Chitra's soulful rendition adds depth to the song, making it a perfect companion for moments of relaxation and contemplation. This track promises to resonate with anyone seeking solace in music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Soul Of Varisu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of deep emotions and spirituality. With K.S.Chitra's enchanting vocals and Thaman S's soulful composition, this song promises to resonate with listeners on a profound level. Experience a journey through nostalgia and devotion with this beautiful track from the upcoming film Varisu.
stanzaMeanings: I hear a sound, is it true that it has come in the right time? The fruits I have gathered, will they go away? The music is soft and soothing.
In the child's home, dreams are blooming. My heart swings in the joyful clouds.
From my hometown, the part that separated is here. The smile I lost and the pain I felt are back here again.
At this moment, in my heart, there is a flow. In my eyes, is time standing still? Will the smile on my face last forever?
I have waited to see your face. Today, are you coming? Will the time pass slowly? I have searched for you in my mother's embrace.
